title: Tunisian Crispy Onion Fries
description: A delicious and crispy twist on traditional French fries, inspired by the flavors of Tunisia. Serve as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Peel the onions and slice them into long, thin strips.
Dredge the onion strips in the flour to coat.
Fry the onion strips in batches until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per batch.
Drain the fries on paper towels and sprinkle with crispy seasoning blend.
Toss the fries with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the Tunisian crispy onion fries hot, with stir-fry sauce for dipping (if using).
